description: Enable the 'Fixed Assets' module for Northwind Traders and register a new fixed asset named 'Bosch CDR 900 Diagnostic System'. Use the following details: Acquisition Date: 2024-07-15, Acquisition Cost: 8500, Depreciation Method: Straight-line, Useful Life: 60 months (5 years), and Salvage/Residual Value: 500. Login credentials: Username 'administrator', no password.
